creator: freebsd-gnats@in-addr.com
text:
The seamonkey in ports is outdated and has known security problems.  Release 1.1.10 fixes the problems

Fix: Patch enclosed (and submitted using seamonkey 1.1.10)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: grep DISTVERSION /usr/ports/www/seamonkey/Makefile
